description: M20 baseline conformance for trust anchor lists and issuer attestations.

checks.description: trust_anchor_list_hash must equal object_hash('trust_anchor_list', trust_anchor_list) and timestamps must be valid
issuer_attestation_hash/signature object bindings must be valid
issuer_attestation attestation_type and trust_signal must be registered
attestation trust resolution must follow anchor list signer/kid + issuer linkage + validity windows
